title: calamintha grandiflora var. micrantha
intro: Calamintha grandiflora var. micrantha, also known as mountain balm or lesser calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Calamintha grandiflora var. micrantha include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural pain reliever. In herbal preparations, Calamintha grandiflora var. micrantha can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
